messages.content:

Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.

message.content: This section addresses the topic of chart types, specifically identifying "line charts" (折线图) as a recognized category. It can answer questions regarding which chart types are listed or introduced in the document. The excerpt does not provide definitions, procedures, dates, claims, specific tables or figures, metrics, or evidence types.
